docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-13-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY SCHUDER, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHUDER, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUPPET, MICHAEL $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
